PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LASKY, NEIL A ONE RENT A CAR, A CORPORATION $5,700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,700.00, DEFENDANTS TO PAY DAVID DOLANDE $3000 AND SHEREE TAFT $2700.
